name_en: 【Coach Pure Top】CC323 Two-tone Pure High Quality, Teri Series PVC with leather trim, two shoulder straps, comfortable pebble texture, top-grain cowhide, zipper curve looks great on the body, crescent bag shape, definitely a large mahjong bag, different from market quality, Dimensions: 24*15*7.5cm
